title: Implement caching with Redis
original_text: Implemented Redis caching layer for performance optimization. Added cache for frequently accessed database queries. Implemented cache invalidation strategies. Added cache warming for critical data. Implemented distributed caching for multi-server setups. Added cache metrics and monitoring. Implemented cache fallback to database on failures. Added tests for cache behavior. Result: 36 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Add cache for frequently accessed database queries
- Add cache warming for critical data
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(cache): implement Redis caching layer"
